expectations.text: At least 3 video transcripts were extracted
expectations.evidence: 5 transcripts successfully extracted (IBM Technology: 19K chars, David Bombal: 47K chars, Cybernews: 28K chars, EVA BENN: 12K chars, Humphreys Tech Hub: 5K chars)

expectations.text: Output includes a cross-video research summary, not just raw transcripts
expectations.evidence: Full synthesis with Key Themes & Consensus, Notable Disagreements, Most Substantive Videos, Quality Assessment, and Specific Claims sections

expectations.text: Analysis references specific videos by title and/or channel
expectations.evidence: Every claim attributed to specific channel (e.g., 'IBM Technology highlights shadow AI', 'David Bombal's guest warns about prompt injection')

expectations.text: Summary identifies key themes or consensus points across videos
expectations.evidence: 5 numbered themes: AI-powered attacks scaling, shadow AI, deepfakes, AI as defensive tool, quantum threats

expectations.text: Search results with metadata shown before or alongside analysis
expectations.evidence: Search results noted at top, engagement highlights table at bottom with views/subs/ratios
